messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-503 — Both .bb ticket-id extractors require a prefix hyphen (BL-NNN); coder task names using the no-hyphen form (blNNN) resolve to nil, so those tickets silently drop off the pipeline board and are falsely reported as dispatch gaps
What it solves: ROOT CAUSE (traced in code, grep-confirmed 2026-07-17):
  - swarmforge/scripts/pipeline_stage_lib.bb:63-69 — ticket-id-pattern is
    `(?i)\b(BL|GH)-(\d+)\b` (hyphen REQUIRED between prefix and digits). A task header
    "bl493-fold-ticket-events" has NO hyphen between "bl" and "493", so re-find re…
Approval context: New defect fix for a SILENT, live daemon bug surfaced by the coordinator today. Both .bb ticket-id extractors require a hyphen between the prefix and digits (BL-NNN), but ~14 tickets — including the currently-active BL-493 (task "bl493-...") — were minted with the no-hyphen form, so extract-ticket-…
BL-503 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-503" (or "reject BL-503 <reason>") to act.
